channel.title: Test Blog
channel.description: A test blog for fixture-based testing

item.title: Comma Separated Tags
item.description: This post uses comma-separated strings for tags and categories. The normalizeArray function should split on commas and trim whitespace. C...
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Post With Invalid Date
item.description: This post has an invalid date format in the frontmatter. The parser should handle this gracefully by logging a warning and using an empty st...
item.author: Test Author

item.title: no-frontmatter
item.description: This is a post with no frontmatter at all. It starts directly with content. The parser should handle this edge case gracefully. The slug ...
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Post With Description Field
item.description: This summary comes from the description field, not preview or body content.
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Post With Explicit Preview
item.description: This is a custom preview text that should be used instead of auto-generated summary.
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Post With Timezone
item.description: This post has a date with an explicit timezone offset (+09:00 for JST). When the site config has a timezone setting, the date should be conv...
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Space Separated Tags
item.description: This post uses space-separated strings for tags and a plain string for categories. The normalizeArray function should split these into prope...
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Post With Tags and Categories
item.description: This post has tags and categories defined as YAML arrays. The frontmatter parser should correctly extract these as string arrays. Tags ar...
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Post With Excerpt Field
item.description: This summary comes from the excerpt field, the lowest priority custom field.
item.author: Test Author

item.title: Simple Post
item.description: This is a simple test post with minimal frontmatter. It only has a title and date field, which are the most basic metadata fields. The po...
item.author: Test Author
